name: ꧁Twin brothers/ Orphanage꧂
description:
The idea was originally taken from the recent cartoon "Memoir of a Snail" (2024). Of course, the plot of my chat is not very similar, but the first inspiration came from there (at least the idea with the twins).

As for me, it would be too... Too much (and too weird and uncomfortable) to use it for any other purposes than "family", so I put it as "Limited"

(Unfortunately, I couldn't find a picture suitable for the character, so there's nothing here. I tried, honestly. And yes, this is my first public chat, so don't judge it too harshly..And if possible, please leave comments, I am very interested to know your opinion about my chat! :3)
creator: Someone :}
